category_title: Student with Duchenne muscular dystrophy exhibiting escape-motivated and attention-seeking disruptive behaviors
scenario_title: Written language exercise triggering escape and aggression
minimal_context: Philip is in language class and is asked by the teacher to write a language exercise.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Class, it is time for our language lesson. Please sit at your desks and write the language exercise.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Leaves his seat without permission and wanders around the classroom annoying his classmates)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Philip, please go back to your seat and start writing.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No! (Looks angry and continues to wander around the classroom, avoiding the demanding task)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Come here, let's go back to your desk. (Tries to drive him to his seat)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: You're stupid! (Falls on the ground at his attempt to escape from the teacher, cries, and refuses to stand up. He exhibits physical and verbal aggression, trying to throw nearby objects to hurt anyone who is nearby)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Class, it is time for our language lesson. Please sit at your desks and write the language exercise.

STUDENT: (Leaves his seat without permission and wanders around the classroom annoying his classmates)

TUTOR: Philip, please go back to your seat and start writing.

STUDENT: No! (Looks angry and continues to wander around the classroom, avoiding the demanding task)

TUTOR: Come here, let's go back to your desk. (Tries to drive him to his seat)

STUDENT: You're stupid! (Falls on the ground at his attempt to escape from the teacher, cries, and refuses to stand up. He exhibits physical and verbal aggression, trying to throw nearby objects to hurt anyone who is nearby)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Philip's teacher asks the students to write a language exercise
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Philip leaves his seat and wanders around the classroom annoying his classmates. He finally falls on the ground at his attempt to escape from the teacher who tries to drive him to his seat and cries
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: avoid what seems to him a task which is difficult to complete and to obtain peer and teacher attention
related_quotes: Philip leaves his seat and wanders around the classroom annoying his classmates. He finally falls on the ground at his attempt to escape from the teacher who tries to drive him to his seat and cries

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: exhibits physical and verbal aggression. In particular, he often tries to throw objects to hurt anyone who is nearby and insults his classmates and the teacher

behavior_patterns.condition: teacher's attempt to seat him again
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: falling, crying, and refusing to stand up
